summary: Completed testing of GMAO new features: Dashboard Edit Mode (drag-and-drop widgets, add titles/separators, save layout) and Demandes d'Arrêt attachments API. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard Edit Mode implementation with react-beautiful-dnd is well-structured
Attachments API properly handles file upload with 10MB limit validation
Trigger reminders endpoint works correctly for automatic email reminders
DemandeArretDialog has proper file upload UI with drag-and-drop support
updated_files: /app/tests/test_demandes_arret_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for demandes-arret features
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing demandes for attachment tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: 1) Dashboard Edit Mode - 'Modifier' button visible, edit mode activates with toolbar showing Mode Édition/Titre/Séparateur/Réinitialiser/Annuler/Sauvegarder, adding titles and separators works, save persists layout with success toast. 2) Demandes d'Arrêt Attachments - GET /api/demandes-arret/trigger-reminders returns status ok, GET /api/demandes-arret/{id}/attachments returns list, POST upload works with multipart/form-data, DELETE cleanup works. 3) Planning M.Prev - DemandeArretDialog shows 'Pièces jointes (optionnel)' section with file upload area 'Cliquez ou glissez des fichiers ici' and 10MB limit.

modifier_button_visible.details: Button with data-testid='edit-dashboard-btn' found and visible

edit_mode_activation.details: Clicking 'Modifier' shows toolbar with 'Mode Édition' indicator

add_title.details: Titre button opens popover, can enter text/size/color/alignment, 'Ajouter le titre' adds title to dashboard

add_separator.details: Séparateur button adds horizontal separator to dashboard

save_layout.details: Sauvegarder button saves layout, shows success toast 'Disposition du dashboard sauvegardée', exits edit mode

upload_attachment.details: POST /api/demandes-arret/{id}/attachments with multipart/form-data uploads file successfully

reports_history.details: GET /api/demandes-arret/reports/history returns reports list and statistics

demande_arret_button.details: '+Demande d'Arrêt' button visible on Planning M.Prev page

file_upload_area.details: Upload area with 'Cliquez ou glissez des fichiers ici' and 'Maximum 10MB par fichier' visible

file_input_element.details: Hidden file input element present for file selection
